mapper.insert: insert into APPUSER(APP_USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD, MBTI_TYPE_ID, CREATED_AT, UFILE, MOBILE, NICKNAME, PROVIDER, PROVIDER_ID) values(appuser_seq.nextval, #{email}, #{password}, #{mbtiTypeId}, #{createdAt}, #{ufile}, #{mobile}, #{nickname}, #{provider}, #{providerId})
mapper.select: select u.email, u.password, a.auth from APPUSER u left join AUTHORITIES a on a.EMAIL = u.EMAIL where u.email = #{email}
select count(*) from APPUSER where email = #{email}
mapper.update: update APPUSER set PASSWORD = #{password}, MBTI_TYPE_ID = #{mbtiTypeId}, UFILE = #{ufile}, NICKNAME = #{nickname}, MOBILE = #{mobile}, PROVIDER = #{provider}, PROVIDER_ID = #{providerId} where APP_USER_ID = #{appUserId}
mapper.insert: insert into AUTHORITIES(AUTH_ID, EMAIL, AUTH) values(authorities_seq.nextval, #{email}, 'ROLE_MEMBER')
